items.title: [负面] I was once very positive towards this game, but th...
items.summary:
I was once very positive towards this game, but the devs have both gotten greedier in their aggressive monetization (fomo packages that used to be once per major story release are now just randomly thrown in) and have slowed their content pace to a crawl.

The social media and community that you'd normally lean on to get through dry periods is, in this game's case, mostly a bunch of incredible immature people fighting over which realm is the best to the point of it making distinct, cringe camps. Don't think someone's favorite eboy is good? Get a slur in your DM. Do the devs / community manager do anything about this? Of course not.

It's depressing, because this was once a game I thought had amazing potential to keep growing, but I don't trust the people leading it anymore to do so.
